name: Free the Animation
short_description: Free the Animation - WebGL Animation and Game - Animation with the Roller Coaster - Shooting Game with the Roller Coaster
detailed_description:
Update Notes

New:
The version with the virtual reality and A-Frame / WebVR is available (in test mode).
- Launch SteamVR.
- Use a default compatible web browser (.
- Enable WebVR if necessary (with Chrome for example).
- Choose an "Audio Mode" to enable or disable a 3D positional audio track.
- Choose the "Game Mode" to play and kill the monsters by avoiding to miss them.


About the Game

Free the Animation

WebGL Animation and Game

Animation with the Roller Coaster
Shooting Game with the Roller Coaster

Many Background Images:
- Cubemaps
- Spherical Panoramas
- Planar Panoramas

Many Dynamic Effects:
- Fog Density
- Exposure of the Cubemaps and of the Panoramas
- Color Mixing with Variable Opacity

Notes:
- Compatibility with 4K / HDR
- SBS (Side-by-Side)
- Full Screen
- Gamepad Support
- 3D Positional Audio
